title: Regime-Aware Momentum Frozen Reference

selected_result.description: Slightly looser stop to reduce fold whipsaw while keeping the longer hold.
notes: Benchmark SPY return over the test span: 80.45%

Exposure profile: 81.69% of evaluated trading days active, 34.52% average capital deployed, 82.17% peak capital deployed.
Risk-adjusted summary: annualized return 22.63%, annualized volatility 10.88%, Sharpe 1.93, Sortino 3.17, Calmar 2.55.
